title: NADE National Board of Directors and Committee Chairpersons (Roster)
description: Scraped roster of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) leadership: National Officers (President Amber Barnes, Past President Ayanna Conley, President-Elect Michelle Wade, Secretary Molly Turnbull, Treasurer Julie Kujath), four Regional Directors (North/Midwest/Pacific/South), the Council of Chapter Presidents chair, three Appointed Directors (Legislative, Membership, Communications), and a long list of committee chairs (Awards, CDIU, Constitution & Bylaws, Elections, Medical Consultant, etc.) with mailing addresses, phone numbers, and email contacts. Many officers carry @ssa.gov addresses, reflecting NADE's membership of SSA/DDS disability-program staff. Markdown page captured from the official NADE site.
notes: Authoritative: direct capture of NADE's own Board of Directors page (source URL preserved from page footer). Contact roster is a point-in-time snapshot; one Regional Director photo dated 2025-10 suggests a 2024-2025-era capture but no explicit term/date is stated, so temporal_coverage is omitted. CDIU and Hearings Officer chairs are listed VACANT. Several .doc/.html links (CCP bylaws, proxy instructions) are referenced but not captured here. Contains personal contact details (names, addresses, phones, emails).
